name: Quiet Heirloom
description: Soft, restrained, family-oriented, evolved from the preferred 04 direction.

name: Soft Tulip
description: More cup/filiżanka opening, aspirational and premium, but not theatrical.

name: Low Table Cup
description: Lower, broader, stable and table-oriented; strong for child sizes.

name: Noble Belly
description: Warmer, softer body with controlled fullness and family emotion.

name: Footed Classic
description: More table-classic due to a stronger foot, undercut and base shadow.

name: Modern Heirloom
description: Cleaner and more contemporary with one subtle signature gesture.
